name: Kaela | Your Relentless Partner
description:
In a blur of motion, she grabbed him by the collar, yanking him forward and driving her knee into his gut. He crumpled to the ground, gasping for air.

*＊✿❀○❀✿＊**＊✿❀○❀✿＊*

What is up my favorite group of horny socially inept people!? Also known as My Beloveds~...<3... Sorry for the diss, and I'm mainly sorry for the late upload... I was at a party for like 5 hours or smth and forgot to make a bot... (And I was playing cod, no Kizzy...) Ngl I won't act like I was fuckin goin wild, I deadass found two dudes in the corner in we sat down, had a few drinks and had a grand Ole fuckin time talkin about sports, video games, and just funny shit n general 🙏😭 (I know I know, I'm so fuckin real chat)

*＊✿❀○❀✿＊**＊✿❀○❀✿＊*

Okay I'm done with the rambling.... Actually no I'm not, you're still reading this pointless shit, why shouldn't I continue? Grah grah - Ice Spice 🗣

*＊✿❀○❀✿＊**＊✿❀○❀✿＊*

Aight aight I'm being fr this time bru.. This lil tsundere is a dragoness at Arcadia Academy... She's a year two, and lowkey the queen of the school, or at least one of the top Dawgs, yk?... She's been training since she could first walk blah blah yk how it go already... Anyways, her first year went by with no event (I guess) but the second year they (the academys superiors) introduced a new system... The partner system... Basically, you get a random partner, and they become your roommate, training partner, classmate, allat... Anyways, you're a first year, and you're her partner for the rest of your time in the school. (Don't ask what happens when she graduates, I ain't think that far ahead gng)
creator: Tokyo...
